apps.cloudflared_token_origin_hint: Token mode: Cloudflare ignores Hyve origin unless you add a Cloudflare API token + external hostname and save. Otherwise logs will still show localhost from the dashboard.
apps.local_install_desc: The service is not installed locally yet. You can install it here and then adjust its settings.
apps.watchdog_auto_restart_hint: Starts with Hyve and restarts after unexpected crashes, with increasing delays (not a tight loop on errors).
apps.no_usb_adapters: No USB adapter detected. Check if the Zigbee dongle is connected.
apps.preflight_no_checks: No checks required — ready to install.
apps.preflight_docker_auto_install: Missing — will be installed automatically (Colima via Homebrew).
apps.preflight_docker_auto_install_linux: Missing — will be installed automatically (docker.io via apt).
apps.preflight_docker_daemon_down: Docker is installed but the daemon is not running.
apps.preflight_docker_missing: Neither Docker nor Homebrew is installed.
apps.preflight_fix_install_brew: Install Homebrew: https://brew.sh (then retry — Hyve installs the rest).
apps.preflight_fix_install_docker_linux: Install Docker on the host (Proxmox LXC: enable Features → nesting, then retry install).
apps.preflight_brew_auto_install_linux: Missing — will be installed automatically via apt.
apps.preflight_fix_install_brew_linux: Install on the host: apt install mosquitto (requires root).
apps.preflight_xcode_license: The Xcode license has not been accepted.
apps.preflight_portaudio_missing: The portaudio library is missing — pyaudio cannot be built.
apps.port_selected_hint: Port selected — remember to save the configuration
apps.configure_web_ui_first: Configure host or Web UI URL first.
apps.addon_ui_unreachable: Addon Web UI is not reachable from Hyve.
